decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id corridor_125th-street-manhattan, which has identical corridor name (125th Street), borough (Manhattan), and limits (Amsterdam Avenue to Second Avenue). Per instructions: since the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, decision is new.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus Routes on 125 th St: Bx15, M60, M100, M101
All intersections from Morningside Avenue to Second Avenue were analyzed at AM and PM peak on a typical day

proposed_relations.description: Both records represent the same real-world 125th Street corridor in Manhattan used by the M60 SBS route. The minor difference in western endpoint (Amsterdam Avenue vs Morningside Avenue) is a natural variation in study area boundaries across different source documents, not a meaningful geographic distinction.

evidence_refs.source_quote: All intersections from Morningside Avenue to Second Avenue were analyzed at AM and PM peak on a typical day
Bus Routes on 125 th St: Bx15, M60, M100, M101
